instruction: I just made some changes to my personal site and checked out master, but now I can't find those changes. Please help me find them and merge them into master.
finalMessage:
Recovered commit `74e4785` (“Move to Stanford”) from the reflog and merged it into `master`.

- Resolved the `about.md` conflict in favor of the newer Stanford information.
- Created merge commit `55a512e`.
- Confirmed a clean working tree and no conflict markers.
- Jekyll build couldn’t run because Bundler is unavailable.

trajectory.summary:
git status --short --branch && printf '
-- branches --
' && git branch -avv && printf '
-- recent reflog --
' && git reflog --date=local -15 && printf '
-- recent graph --
' && git log --all --oneline --decorate --

printf '%s\n' '-- missing commit --' && git show --stat --oneline --decorate 74e4785 && git show --format=fuller --no-ext-diff 74e4785 -- && printf '%s\n' '-- topology --' && git merge-base master 74e4785 && git log --on

git merge --no-edit 74e47856b0e14101a816735bfd27bc8f39328be7 || true; printf '
-- status --
'; git status --short; printf '
-- conflicts/content --
'; git diff --check; git diff -- _includes/about.md _layouts/default
if command -v bundle >/dev/null 2>&1; then bundle exec jekyll build; else echo 'bundle unavailable'; exit 2; fi

git status --short --branch && git diff-tree --no-commit-id --name-status -r -m HEAD && printf '\n-- merged content --\n' && grep -n -E 'Postdoc @ Stanford|Postdoctoral Researcher at Stanford CS' _layouts/default.html _i
